who: small law firm accountants processing 5–15 trust account reports/quarter
offer: For small law firm accountants processing 5–15 trust account reports/quarter, the complexity of legal compliance causes late filings. We automate report compilation and filing instead of manual compilation and filing of reports.
problem: Inaccurate or late filing of legal trust account reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law firm accountants
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 small law firm accountants
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual report entry and reminder notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing trust account data
Provide one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
